description_long: This trash bin features a robust, rectangular body with a deep blue lower section and a dark gray to black upper section. The front panel is distinguished by a central, protruding black flap, likely serving as the main waste deposit slot, flanked by two gray panels with yellow caution stripes and subtle surface scratches, suggesting frequent use. The top of the bin is flat and slightly beveled, with no visible handles or wheels, giving it a sturdy, stationary appearance. The sides and back are smooth and unadorned, with the blue color dominating the lower portion and the dark gray upper rim providing contrast. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on durability and ease of cleaning, suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks or parks. The bin appears to be made primarily of hard plastic, with some metal reinforcement possibly present in the lid or flap mechanism.
description: A sturdy, rectangular blue and black trash bin with a central front flap and caution-striped panels, designed for urban waste disposal. The surface shows signs of use and is made primarily of hard plastic.
description_view_0: Front view shows the central black flap, two gray panels with yellow caution stripes, and visible surface scratches.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals a smooth blue panel with the top gray section, lacking any visible openings or features.
description_view_2: Back view displays a plain blue and gray surface with no openings, flaps, or distinguishing marks.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with a smooth blue panel and gray top, free of any interactive elements.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: yellow caution stripes; no recycling or waste type labels
